headline: Merck Extends KEYTRUDA Reach As New LDL Drug Nears FDA Decision
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) received expanded EU approval for KEYTRUDA-based regimens in platinum-resistant ovarian cancer, making it the first and only PD-1 inhibitor option in this setting. The approval broadens KEYTRUDA's treatment reach in Europe, adding a new group of eligible ovarian cancer patients. Separately, Merck reported strong Phase 3 results for enlicitide decanoate in LDL cholesterol lowering. The company is preparing a near-term FDA priority review filing for enlicitide decanoate.
